message:
feat(cli): add dedup, cross-project, and meta commands

Three new CLI commands for skill management, cross-project learning,
and meta-skill composition.

## ms dedup - Duplicate Skill Detection

Finds and manages duplicate skills using semantic + structural similarity:

  ms dedup scan [--threshold 0.85] [--limit 50]
  ms dedup review <skill_a> <skill_b>
  ms dedup merge <source> <target>
  ms dedup alias <skill> <alias>

The scan command uses the DeduplicationEngine from src/dedup/ which
combines:
- Semantic similarity via embeddings (configurable threshold)
- Structural similarity via tag/section overlap
- Recommendation engine suggesting merge vs alias actions

## ms cross-project - Cross-Project Learning

Aggregates patterns and coverage gaps across multiple projects using
CASS session metadata:

  ms cross-project summary [--query "*"] [--top 10]
  ms cross-project patterns [--min-occurrences 3] [--min-projects 2]
  ms cross-project gaps [--min-score 1.0]

Features:
- summary: Sessions by project with tool/file statistics
- patterns: Pattern mining across projects (errors, commands, etc.)
- gaps: Patterns with weak/no skill matches (coverage opportunities)

## ms meta - Meta-Skill Management

Commands for working with composed slice bundles (meta-skills):

  ms meta list [--query "..."]
  ms meta show <name>
  ms meta load <name> [--context key=value]
  ms meta search <query>

The load command resolves slice conditions, packs selected slices,
and reports which slices were included/skipped based on context.

## Wiring Changes

- src/lib.rs: Export dedup module
- src/cli/mod.rs: Add Dedup, CrossProject commands to enum
- src/cli/commands/mod.rs: Wire command dispatch
- src/meta_skills/mod.rs: Export MetaSkillManager and related types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
